title: Peak Usage Hours by City and Plan
prompt: For each city and user plan type, find the hour of the day (0-23) when the most trips were requested. Output should include city, plan, hour, and trip count, ordered by city, plan, and hour.
reference_sql: SELECT u.city, u.plan, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.request_ts) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM users u JOIN trips t ON u.user_id = t.user_id GROUP BY u.city, u.plan, hour ORDER BY u.city, u.plan, hour
hint_notes: Key idea is to extract the hour from timestamp and group by city, plan, and hour. Common mistake is forgetting to handle NULL values in complete_ts or incorrectly joining tables.
